title: SEP-2640: Skills Extension for the Model Context Protocol
notes: Retrieved via WebFetch summariser; quotes are as surfaced from the PR. This is an open (unmerged) MCP spec PR — an evolving proposal, not a ratified standard. Method naming differs from the Microsoft prose: SEP-2640's current text centres on `skill://index.json` + direct `resources/read`, whereas Microsoft describes `resources/list`/`resources/read`. Cited only to corroborate that Foundry serves skills over the MCP Resources primitive per SEP-2640.
excerpt: SEP-2640: Skills Extension (status: Open). Defines a transport binding for serving Agent Skills over MCP using the Resources primitive, establishing the `skill://` URI scheme. "A skill's URI is directly readable via `resources/read` whether or not it appears in any index." "A server SHOULD expose a resource at the well-known URI `skill://index.json` whose content is a JSON index." "This extension does not redefine, constrain, or extend the skill format. Future revisions of the Agent Skills specification apply automatically." Extension identifier: `io.modelcontextprotocol/skills`; URI pattern `skill://<skill-path>/SKILL.md`; requires SHA-256 digest verification for integrity.
